page_metadata.biotools__summary: FaME is a tool that can test the aberrations of the samples in one or more datasets in order to find signals of mutual exclusivity or co-occurrence between all the pairs of genes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FaME is a tool that can test the aberrations of the samples in one or more datasets in order to find signals of mutual exclusivity or co-occurrence between all the pairs of genes.
